antiPatterns.scenario: Using Pagination for step-by-step wizard navigation
antiPatterns.reason: Pagination is for browsing content pages, not sequential step progression
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a Stepper or custom step navigation

antiPatterns.scenario: Showing all page numbers for large datasets
antiPatterns.reason: Renders an unusably long row of links
antiPatterns.alternative: Use PaginationEllipsis to collapse ranges and show a window around the current page

antiPatterns.reason: Previous/next are the primary navigation affordance on mobile
antiPatterns.alternative: Always include previous and next controls

slots.PaginationContent: Flex container for all pagination items
slots.PaginationItem: Wrapper li for each page link or control
slots.PaginationPrevious: Previous page navigation with chevron icon
slots.PaginationNext: Next page navigation with chevron icon

interactions.click: Navigates to the target page via href
interactions.hover: PaginationLink shows ghost/outline hover styles from buttonVariants

responsive.mobile: Previous/Next labels hidden below sm breakpoint; icons remain visible
responsive.desktop: Full text labels for previous/next shown

accessibility.screenReader: Active page announced via aria-current="page"; ellipsis has sr-only "More pages" text

rules: Use PaginationEllipsis when total pages exceed a reasonable window (5-7 visible)
Mark the current page with isActive on PaginationLink
PaginationLink renders anchor tags — pass href for navigation

aiHints.context: Use for navigating paginated content (tables, lists, search results). Built on buttonVariants for consistent styling. PaginationLink uses anchor tags — isActive toggles between outline and ghost variants. Previous/next text labels auto-hide on mobile.
